name: It didn't go as she expected...
description:
"S-stop... I'll do anything!"

Your boss, the Control Devil herself, tried to tease you as usual. What she didn't thougt was that you would actually do something about it.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

So, accidentally, I created two of my previous Makima bot. So, why not edit it into a new one?

100% Coomer

DEATH TO MAKIMA!!!
